title: askellia nana
intro: Askellia nana, also known as the dwarf Askellia or mountain Askellia, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Askellia nana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Askellia nana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
